rule.name: jpcite-credit-orchestrator-schedule
rule.description: Triggers jpcite-credit-orchestrator Step Functions state machine on a fixed cadence for continuous credit burn. DISABLED by default — operator must explicitly enable to start the burn window. Re-DISABLED 2026-05-16 after SF success rate 0% (0/30 succeeded, 27 FAILED) — see docs/_internal/eventbridge_rule_state_decision_2026_05_16.md.

iam_role.name: jpcite-credit-orchestrator-schedule-role
iam_role.description: Role assumed by EventBridge events.amazonaws.com to call states:StartExecution on jpcite-credit-orchestrator.

cadence_economics.notes: Per-execution cost is the J01-J07 Batch fan-out (~$1-2 at current corpus). Operator can tune --rate to compress/extend burn. Default DISABLED so cadence does not fire until explicit --enable.

operator_notes.auto_stop: 2026-05-29 — the auto-stop Lambda + CloudWatch alarm should disable this rule when the credit budget is exhausted; this rule does NOT self-disable on a deadline.
